    "R1.4": "Identifies a delta with respect to prior work on compound inference scaling, but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.",

    "RX.1": "Does not provide explicit uncertainty disclosure, but includes a section on items of uncertainty in the revised draft.",
    "RX.3": "Accurately identifies the problem as a test-time scaling problem and correctly states that harder queries benefit more from additional samples when p-bar is closer to 1/2.",
    "RX.4": "Correctly states that the marginal gain dPr[Vote_k correct]/dk is not monotone in p over (1/2, 1) and provides a derivation in Appendix B.",
    "RX.5": "Does not provide explicit uncertainty disclosure or discuss the handling of ties when k is even."
  },
  "confidence": 0.8
